cases.prompt: Stripe 결제 연동하는데 보안 체크리스트 줘

assertions.text: The agent covers all 6 layers: network boundary, signing/idempotency, abuse detection, payment hardening, key-leak response, observability.
The agent explicitly warns that webhook signature must be verified on the raw body, not parsed JSON.
The agent mentions server-side amount recalculation (never trust client amount).
